briefdescription.para: In-Place Update using PDI in Image Store, 1-DDR Location.
Function pointer for PDI address lookup.
Function pointer for ASU presence check.
Function pointer for ASU image loading.
This function is the task handler for ASU in-place update.

detaileddescription.para: It polls for ASU shutdown completion, loads the new firmware image, resets ASU, and waits for the new firmware to initialize.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if ASU update completed successfully.
XPLMI_ERR_ASU_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT if ASU shutdown exceeds 60 seconds.
XPLMI_ERR_ASU_FW_NOT_RUNNING if ASU firmware fails to restart after update.
Error code from XLoader_LoadAsu() if firmware loading fails.

inbodydescription.para: Check ASU shutdown state
Retry if shutdown is not complete
Reschedule task to retry later
Shutdown complete - reset retry counter for next update cycle
Load new ASU firmware image
Reset ASU to start new firmware
Wait for ASU firmware to initialize

briefdescription.para: This function gets UpdateAsuPdiAddr variable value.
This function checks if ASU firmware is present and running.

listitem.para: TRUE if ASU firmware is present (FW_IS_PRESENT bit set).
FALSE if ASU firmware is not running.

inbodydescription.para: Check ASU firmware presence by verifying FW_IS_PRESENT bit in RTCA exec status register.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes ASU in-place update subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is the PDI address look-up handler.
is the callback to check ASU presence in PDI.
is the callback to load ASU image from PDI.

listitem.para: XPLM_ERR_TASK_CREATE if failed to create ASU update task.

inbodydescription.para: Store the handler function pointers
Create ASU update task which will be triggered by IPI command
Assign task ID for identification

briefdescription.para: This function handles In-Place ASU Update.

parameterdescription.para: is the command structure with payload containing DDR address.

inbodydescription.para: Check if the command structure is valid
Validate payload length
Get DDR reserved address for ASU update
Check if DDR reserved area is valid
Check update flag
Check if update is from image store or DDR
Check if ASU image is present in the specified PDI
Check if ASU firmware is currently running
Retrieve the pre-created ASU update task
Send event notification to trigger ASU shutdown
Trigger the async task to monitor shutdown and load new firmware

briefdescription.para: This file contains ASU in-place update implementation for versal_2ve_2vm platforms.
